heading: Restrictions
label: 152307 Restrictions
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)152307(a)36:672 (words after comma)., §§ 9, 10, 12, .Aug. 1, 1956, ch. 82470 Stat. 796152307(b)36:672 (words before comma).152307(c)36:670.152307(d)36:669(a).152307(e)36:669(b).In subsection (a), the word “pecuniary” is omitted as unnecessary.In subsection (b), the words “any shares of” are omitted as unnecessary.In subsection (d), the words “inure to the benefit of” are substituted for “inure to” for consistency in the revised title. children.heading: .—Profit
children.label: a .—Profit
children.text: The corporation may not engage in business for profit.

children.heading: .—Stock and Dividends
children.label: b .—Stock and Dividends
children.text: The corporation may not issue stock or declare or pay a dividend.

children.heading: .—Political Activities
children.label: c .—Political Activities
children.text: The corporation or a director, officer, or member as such may not contribute to, support, or assist a political party or candidate for elective public office.

children.heading: .—Distribution of Income or Assets
children.label: d .—Distribution of Income or Assets
children.text: The income or assets of the corporation may not inure to the benefit of, or be distributed to, a director, officer, or member except on dissolution or final liquidation of the corporation.

children.heading: .—Loans
children.label: e .—Loans
children.text: The corporation may not make a loan to a director, officer, or employee. Directors who vote for or assent to making a loan to a director, officer, or employee, and officers who participate in making the loan, are jointly and severally liable to the corporation for the amount of the loan until it is repaid.
